title: Freaky Eva eats Nerv commander
wikitext:
[]: Freaky Eva eats Nerv commander             Quote Post by Duke » Wed Mar 04, 2009 1:58 pm http://img18.imageshack.us/my.php?image=unit1yumyums.jpg Okay... why is Unit 01 eating Gendo, and why does it look like that?

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Wed Mar 04, 2009 2:12 pm End of Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Duke » Wed Mar 04, 2009 2:12 pm yes I know it's EoE, that's where I took the screenie from. But... why?

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Wed Mar 04, 2009 2:17 pm Ah. That's the question that sends Reichu scrambling back through millenia of posts to come up with this . Maybe Gendo wanted it all along? A way of being reunited with his wife? His way of being instrumentalized...but why only his upper half? We can only speculate and hypothesize. What we do know is that Gendo is now quite, quite dead.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Wed Mar 04, 2009 3:19 pm seeing as unit 1 is not actually there, that occurs in his head most likely

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Wed Mar 04, 2009 3:27 pm And yet, the top half of his body has gone mysteriously missing.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 04, 2009 3:30 pm Reichu in other recent thread wrote: Just to get this out so I don't feel like I'm hoarding secret information anymore: A caption in Chronicle from one of Gendo's character pages says, "Gendo's final words are an apology to his son, 'I'm sorry, Shinji'. Immediately after, he vanishes into an Eva-01 symbolizing Shinji." Why Gendo would identify a berserk-looking Eva-01 with Shinji (especially given we hear him address Eva-01 as "Yui" at one point), I have no idea; the whole thing seems only a little less silly than OMF's old proposal that Bizarro Eva-01 doesn't just represent Shinji, it IS Shinji . Now if Chronicle would explain why Yui changes into a purple shirt right before Eva-01 shows up to take a bite out of Gendo, then I'd feel a little more appeased. (But I don't have Yui's article, so I have no clue what it does or doesn't say.)

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Wed Mar 04, 2009 3:51 pm IrkenEvangelion wrote: And yet, the top half of his body has gone mysteriously missing.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 04, 2009 4:28 pm Axell wrote: lcl and at fields can do strange things

[]:             Quote Post by Duke » Wed Mar 04, 2009 4:57 pm in the movie it looks like to me that Unit 01 just eats his head, but then later on it looks like it ate the whole top half of his body. Maybe his apology to Shinji meant that he was not going to be part of 3i, and by being eaten that symbolizes that he WON'T be tanged, so he would never be with Yui again? ^if you somehow understood that, you deserve a cookie.

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Wed Mar 04, 2009 4:59 pm Aren't Yui and Shinji together at that point, anyhow?

[]:             Quote Post by Duke » Wed Mar 04, 2009 5:04 pm what I meant in my (now un-understandable) theory was that Gendo would never be with Yui again.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 04, 2009 5:20 pm Duke wrote: in the movie it looks like to me that Unit 01 just eats his head, but then later on it looks like it ate the whole top half of his body.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Wed Mar 04, 2009 6:53 pm Reichu wrote: Axell wrote: lcl and at fields can do strange things

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Mar 04, 2009 6:57 pm Okay, I understand that symbolically "Freaky Eva-01" is meant to be Shinji, but I still believe Eva-01/Yui were actually there, just simply borrowing some of that multiple places quantum physics magic of Lilith and Adam. I just don't see why Eva-01 inducting Gendo has to be a one or the other situation in regards to what Chronicle stated. Speaking of which, that was written by Gainax staff instead of just random people correct? It is canonical and everything (though probably on a specific tier)?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 04, 2009 7:28 pm @SSD: I haven't translated the list representing Chronicle's authorship, so I don't know if any of the people have direct ties to Khairax or not. Chronicle also seems to think (in that conditionals-heavy kind of way) that Gendo was indeed complemented, and that Yui was actually looking on when he got chomped (as opposed to being the one doing the chomping), and Gendo did revert to LCL. Last sentence here: リリスとなったレイが全人類の前に現れた時、ゲンドウの元にもまた、彼が持ち続けていた人物が現れた。力なく横たわる彼の傍ら、消失した当時のままの姿で立つ碇ユイ。おもむろにシンジに対する心情を打ち明けるゲンドウに、ユイは「シンジが怖かったのね」とすべてを包みこむような微笑みを浮かべる。ゲンドウのシンジに対する冷たい仕打ちは、「自分が人から愛されることが信じられない」という彼自身の内面がもたらしたものだった。最愛のユイに見守られながら、初号機に食べ込まれるかのようにL.C.L.へと帰した瞬間、ゲンドウ自身の補完は完遂されたと言えるのかもしれない。

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Mar 04, 2009 7:37 pm OM NOM NOM NOM. That is all.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Mar 05, 2009 12:23 pm I always imagined that Yui rejected Gendo from Instrumentality for being such a dick to her little baby. Mama Bear Syndrome >>>>>>>> Marriage.

[]:             Quote Post by Duke » Thu Mar 05, 2009 12:25 pm yeah, that's kinda what I think too. also, I think like in episode 19 Yui does the most primal things, but nearly every time she goes berserk she does it to protect Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Thu Mar 05, 2009 3:59 pm To me it's Gendo reflecting on what he's done, and, when he's thinking about how he's hurt Shinji (who can, in many ways, be represented by 01), he flashes upon an image of his own creation coming back to kill him as divine retribution.
